title: Enhancements for Minecraft!
description:
Have you ever thought that Minecraft was just... bleak?
Thought it was missing a spark?
No worries! This mod adds lots of stuff to Minecraft!
Want to go to the sculk dimension? It's here! Want to have a glowing sculk block? It's here too!
body:
# Note for new viewers

This mod is going to be merged with an upcoming mod I am making called "Dumb SH**". As such, this mod will be discontinued and any features will be implemented into the new mod at some point. This does mean that I can fix various features from this mod.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bxTRT14dohI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
EFM adds a bunch of stuff!
It adds some unused content, such as the crystallized honey and the sculk jaw. It also adds some original content! But if I were to mention ALL of it in the description alone, I would probably be typing forever!

In general, the mod adds stuff to affect terrain, and add ambience and challenge to your worlds.

But here are some highlights!

# Lindrock!
A new ore! It works like netherite in terms of making tools, using the (unfortunately not yet obtainable) Lindrock Upgrade!

# Voided Biome!!
A new biome, inspired by the deep dark! Has a layer of void blocks ontop of the new Easelstone. Also has lindrock in it, btw. And is home to Acid Geysers!

# Sculk Jaw!!!
An originally scrapped block, but made it back via this mod! When you drop in it, you have to break it to get out. Jumping and autojump won't work!

# Sculk Dimension!!!!
This dimension was theorized, but never came to be. But, this mod adds it! Yes, it is currently bland, but it will be updated in a future update!

# Dynamite Launcher!!!!!
The Dynamite Laucher is an overpow- wait... wait t-this isn't supposed to be in the release until it's fixed. N-no, i-it isn't supposed to exist yet.
No. NO! NO-

In total, this mod took a while to make, and I would appreciate it for you to download it.
And you can check my [Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@MineCrafter728-sd8xc) for updates and announcements!

1.1 is out!!!
